'''Rainbow qaana''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Insect/Legends|insects]] that were bred and used by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. They were kept for the ethereal [[Music/Legends|music]] that they produced when clicking their mandibles together and were only used in special ceremonies, or in the presence of the [[Supreme Overlord]].

{{Species-stub}}
